zh.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle是Robert Lisle和Alice FitzGerald的兒子，於1248年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾。他於1277年與Alice d'Armenters在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年11月在英國波克夏斯帕斯爾特享年39歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle是Robert Lisle和Alice FitzGerald的儿子，于1248年出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾。他于1277年与Alice d'Armenters在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1287年11月在英国波克夏斯帕斯爾特享年39岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle was born in 1248, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England as the son of Robert Lisle and Alice FitzGerald. He married Alice d'Armenters in 1277, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in November 1287, in Sparsholt, Berkshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle est né en 1248, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, fils de Robert Lisle et Alice FitzGerald. Il a épousé Alice d'Armenters en 1277, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1287, à Sparsholt, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle wurde 1248 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, als Sohn von Robert Lisle und Alice FitzGerald geboren. Er hat 1277 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England Alice d'Armenters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im November 1287 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Sparsholt, Berkshire, England und wurde in Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle è nato il nel 1248 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England come figlio di Robert Lisle e Alice FitzGerald. Lui sposato Alice d'Armenters nel 1277, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1287, nel Sparsholt, Berkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isleは1248年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでRobert LisleとAlice FitzGeraldの息子として生まれた。1277年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでAlice d'Armentersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年11月にイギリスバークシュアイアスパーショルトで39歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle(은)는 1248년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Robert Lisle(와)과 Alice FitzGerald의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1277년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Alice d'Armenters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 11월 영국 버크실르 스파르쇼트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle nasceu em 1248, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra filho de Robert Lisle e Alice FitzGerald. Ele casou-se com Alice d'Armenters em 1277, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1287, em Sparsholt, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard de L'Isle родился в 1248 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert Lisle и Alice FitzGerald. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice d'Armenters в 1277 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1287 г. в местности спаршолт, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.
